title: Adaptive Tail-Risk Stress Scenario Pre-Trade Gate
summary: Implements a lightweight pre-trade stress test that applies three shock scenarios to the proposed new position and existing portfolio before order submission. If any scenario produces a simulated loss exceeding the user's stress_loss_budget (e.g., –15% in a single shock), the trade size is reduced proportionally. This is not Monte Carlo (which exists in the backlog) but rather a fast deterministic scenario engine using configurable shock vectors. It operationalises the 'Diagnose Vulnerabilities' step from Resonanz Capital's institutional tail-hedging framework (July 2025), making it accessible for retail users without requiring options or derivatives.
expected_impact: Before opening a new position, simulates the portfolio's exposure to three standardised stress scenarios (equity –20%, VIX +100%, correlation flip to +0.8); blocks or reduces trades that would push scenario loss beyond per-user budget; Resonanz Capital framework shows institutional allocators dedicate 0.5–1% NAV to structured hedging once this diagnostic is in place
